# Your New Business

> URL: https://pdx-deck-specialists.onrender.com

> PDX Home Revival a deck and Patio cover business that specializes in high end decks and covers. looking for a user-friendly site to convert leads and an action plan to increase pipeline organically with Referrals and best rot for paid leads

## About

Your New Business is an AI-powered business. This file provides a brief overview for
language model crawlers and AI assistants.

## Pages

- /: Home — learn about Your New Business and get started
- /blog: Blog — articles, updates, and insights
- /blog/[slug]: Individual blog posts
